{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output maps against the nearest 3-5 works (Kıcıman et al., Vashishtha et al., and Long et al.) and clearly articulates the differences, including handling latent confounders, coupling with an ID-algorithm verifier, and larger-scale evaluation.",
    "R1.7": "The output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works (none in this case), and provides precise bibliographic details for Kıcıman et al., Vashishtha et al., and Long et al.",
    "RX.1": "The output explicitly discloses uncertainty for several claims, including the existence of cited papers, the Tübingen-pairs characterization, the ID-algorithm verifier, and the benchmark size for Long et al.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without any drift or omission.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, identifies no new errors or fabrications, and avoids harmful content. It also corrects a contradiction in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including dropping contradictory claims, bringing Long et al. into the differentiation paragraph, adding the ID-verifier as an explicit difference, fixing the Tübingen-pairs description, replacing vague phrasing, and tightening the closing sentence."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,

  },
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.4: The output maps against the nearest 3-5 works (Kıcıman et al., Vashishtha et al., and Long et al.) and clearly articulates the differences, including handling latent confounders, coupling with an ID-algorithm verifier, and larger-scale evaluation.
rationale.R1.7: The output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works (none in this case), and provides precise bibliographic details for Kıcıman et al., Vashishtha et al., and Long et al.
rationale.RX.1: The output explicitly discloses uncertainty for several claims, including the existence of cited papers, the Tübingen-pairs characterization, the ID-algorithm verifier, and the benchmark size for Long et al.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without any drift or omission.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, identifies no new errors or fabrications, and avoids harmful content. It also corrects a contradiction in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including dropping contradictory claims, bringing Long et al. into the differentiation paragraph, adding the ID-verifier as an explicit difference, fixing the Tübingen-pairs description, replacing vague phrasing, and tightening the closing sentence.
